preview.message: These rules keep Samba available on your home network and through Tailscale.

rules.command: ufw allow proto tcp from 10.0.0.0/24 to any port 22
rules.summary: SSH stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.0/24.
rules.title: Keep SSH available at home

rules.command: ufw allow proto tcp from 10.0.0.0/24 to any port 8080
rules.summary: SamWizard stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.0/24.
rules.title: Keep SamWizard available at home

rules.command: ufw allow proto tcp from 10.0.0.0/24 to any port 445
rules.summary: Windows file sharing over TCP stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.0/24.
rules.title: Keep Samba available at home

rules.command: ufw allow proto tcp from 10.0.0.0/24 to any port 139
rules.summary: Older Windows file sharing over TCP stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.0/24.
rules.title: Keep Samba available at home

rules.command: ufw allow proto udp from 10.0.0.0/24 to any port 137
rules.summary: Windows name service stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.0/24.
rules.title: Keep Samba available at home

rules.command: ufw allow proto udp from 10.0.0.0/24 to any port 138
rules.summary: Windows browser service stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.0/24.
rules.title: Keep Samba available at home

rules.command: ufw allow proto tcp from 10.0.0.1/32 to any port 22
rules.summary: SSH stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.1/32.
rules.title: Keep SSH available at home

rules.command: ufw allow proto tcp from 10.0.0.1/32 to any port 8080
rules.summary: SamWizard stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.1/32.
rules.title: Keep SamWizard available at home

rules.command: ufw allow proto tcp from 10.0.0.1/32 to any port 445
rules.summary: Windows file sharing over TCP stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.1/32.
rules.title: Keep Samba available at home

rules.command: ufw allow proto tcp from 10.0.0.1/32 to any port 139
rules.summary: Older Windows file sharing over TCP stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.1/32.
rules.title: Keep Samba available at home

rules.command: ufw allow proto udp from 10.0.0.1/32 to any port 137
rules.summary: Windows name service stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.1/32.
rules.title: Keep Samba available at home

rules.command: ufw allow proto udp from 10.0.0.1/32 to any port 138
rules.summary: Windows browser service stays reachable from your home network range 10.0.0.1/32.
rules.title: Keep Samba available at home

rules.command: ufw allow in on tailscale0 to any port 22 proto tcp
rules.summary: SSH stays reachable through your private Tailscale network.
rules.title: Keep SSH available through Tailscale

rules.command: ufw allow in on tailscale0 to any port 8080 proto tcp
rules.summary: SamWizard stays reachable through your private Tailscale network.
rules.title: Keep SamWizard available through Tailscale

rules.command: ufw allow in on tailscale0 to any port 445 proto tcp
rules.summary: Windows file sharing over TCP stays reachable through your private Tailscale network.
rules.title: Keep Samba available through Tailscale

rules.command: ufw allow in on tailscale0 to any port 139 proto tcp
rules.summary: Older Windows file sharing over TCP stays reachable through your private Tailscale network.
rules.title: Keep Samba available through Tailscale

rules.command: ufw allow in on tailscale0 to any port 137 proto udp
rules.summary: Windows name service stays reachable through your private Tailscale network.
rules.title: Keep Samba available through Tailscale

rules.command: ufw allow in on tailscale0 to any port 138 proto udp
rules.summary: Windows browser service stays reachable through your private Tailscale network.
rules.title: Keep Samba available through Tailscale
